_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromatosis-1 heterozygosity increases microglia in a spatially and temporally restricted pattern relevant to mouse optic glioma formation and growth.

_contextSnippet: highly selective marker of brain microglia...anti-CD68 antibodies label resident brain microglia...lymphocytes...neutrophils...dendritic cells
details: Highly selective marker of brain microglia, superior to CD68 which labels multiple cell types including macrophages, neutrophils, and dendritic cells
